commit_scope: Compile focused BML decimal and exponent float source literals into BMA-native execution with forward/backward proof.

local_validation.notes: The float literal source proof returns 67108863 across Go/Rust/TypeScript kernels. Existing numeric literal and file execution proofs remain green: 1073741823 and 131071. The kernel-native audit reports no new unexpected BML/BMF host-native semantics; ontology validation passes across Go/Rust/TS.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A .bml source file containing focused decimal and exponent float literals now parses through native and Form BML scanners, lowers into BMA return-float programs, executes forward to native f64 values, and replays backward to the empty VM state.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-float-literals-source-proof.fk

phase_gate.reason: This closes focused source-to-native BMA support for BML decimal and exponent float literals. Full BML thesis parity remains open: signed float folding, character escape parity, arbitrary expression/control lowering, and whole companion-corpus native execution are still required.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/tests/fixtures/bml-thesis-float-literals.bml is the source fixture for the proof.
form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-float-literals-source-proof.fk proves native file scanning, Form text scanning, BMF rule parse shape, native f64 decode, BMA return values, and backward restoration.
docs/system_audit/bml_thesis_feature_audit_20260601.md records the newly proven focused float source forms and keeps remaining full-parity gaps explicit.
